message:
chore(artifacts): refresh e2e/CI/test logs from latest local suite run (round 6)

Routine artifact refresh in the same vein as rounds 1-5: these
files (artifacts/e2e/*.e2e.json, artifacts/e2e/golden_journeys/
*.golden.json, artifacts/testing/logs/**/*.json, and the
synthetic-forensics-test/manifest.json under artifacts/ci/runs/)
are regenerated by the local cargo + e2e test pipeline on every
clean run.

The diffs are essentially:

- `generated_at_unix_ms` / `timestamp_unix_ms` fields refreshed
  to the new wall-clock time (~1.777e12 ms range).
- `env.rust_version` rolled forward from rustc 1.97.0-nightly
  17584a181 (2026-04-13) to 37d85e592 (2026-04-28) where each
  log captured the toolchain in use.
- `env.cargo_target_dir` updated to reflect the actual local
  target directory used during this run
  (e.g. /tmp/frankenjax-target-codex-bhuo-workspace) instead of
  whichever cache layout the previous round captured.

No semantic changes: pass/fail counts, evidence ledgers, golden
shapes, primitive shape rules, partial-eval expectations, and
staging round-trip outcomes are all byte-identical aside from
the metadata above. Committing on its own so this round's
timestamp churn stays separated from the substantive fuzz target
work landed earlier in the same push.

Stat: 187 files, 864 insertions(+), 864 deletions(-).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
